    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:

            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection

    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-48908 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-23T15:11:05Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-48908", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-48908 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:6874108; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-23, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title: Critical libssh2 Vulnerability Allows Attackers to Execute Remote Code Via Malicious SSH packets
items.description:
A critical security vulnerability has been identified in the widely used libssh2 library, allowing remote attackers to execute arbitrary code through specially crafted SSH packets. The flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-55200, carries a CVSS score of 9.2 and is classified under CWE-680 (Integer Overflow to Buffer Overflow). Disclosed on June 17, 2026, the vulnerability affects libssh2 []

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-12866 - expr-eval Code Execution via toJSFunction
id: 6c84e8ef-f5a9-5ae7-bdb1-5fc8a85a9f0f
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-12866 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-12866
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/23
modified: 2026/06/23
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-12866 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-23T15:11:05Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-12866", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-12866 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:7434771; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-23, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.recommended_sla_action: SCHEDULED PATCH — Apply in next maintenance window

items.title: Glances: XML-RPC Multi-Origin CORS Configuration Silently Falls Back to Wildcard (Incomplete Fix for CVE-2026-33533)
items.description:
### Summary

The Glances XML-RPC server (`glances -s`) introduced a configurable CORS origin list in version 4.5.3 as a mitigation for CVE 2026-33533. However, the implementation silently falls back to `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` whenever `cors_origins` contains more than one entry. An operator who configures an explicit two-entry allowlist (e.g. two internal dashboard origins) intending to restrict browser access instead receives the unrestricted wildcard the same exposure that the original CVE described. A malicious web page served from any origin can issue a CORS simple request to `/RPC2` and read the full system monitoring dataset without the victim's knowledge.

---

### Details

**Affected file:** `glances/server.py`, class `GlancesXMLRPCServer`, line 113

**Direct URL (com

items.title: Critical FFmpeg Vulnerability Allows Attackers to Weaponize Media Files
items.description:
A critical vulnerability has been disclosed in FFmpegs MagicYUV decoder that allows attackers to weaponize seemingly harmless media files and, in some scenarios, achieve remote code execution (RCE). The flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-8461 and dubbed PixelSmash, is a heap out-of-bounds write in FFmpegs libavcodec component, with a CVSS score of 8.8 (High). According to the []

items.description:

items.title: Budibase: SSRF via OAuth2 token endpoint URL reaches internal hosts and cloud metadata
items.description:
## Summary

`fetchToken` in the OAuth2 SDK makes a POST to a builder-supplied URL with plain node-fetch, skipping the `blacklist.isBlacklisted` check that every other outbound fetch path in the codebase uses. The Joi schema for the OAuth2 URL has no scheme or host restriction. Alice, a builder, points an OAuth2 config at `http://169.254.169.254/...` or `http://127.0.0.1:5984/`; the server connects and returns response-body fragments in the validation result.

## Details

`packages/server/src/sdk/workspace/oauth2/utils.ts:17-65` defines `fetchToken`. Near the end:

```typescript
const resp = await fetch(config.url, fetchConfig)
```

`config.url` is whatever the builder stored. `fetchConfig` has `redirect: "follow"` (the default), so a public URL that returns 302 to an internal target is als

items.description:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-8172
 
 Published : June 23, 2026, 6 a.m. | 5hours, 37minutes ago
 
 Description : The Simple Basic Contact Form WordPress plugin through 20250114 does not escape user-supplied input before reflecting it into the contact form output on validation errors, leading to a Reflected Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability that unauthenticated attackers can exploit against site visitors via a crafted link or cross-site form submission.
 
 Severity: 0.0 | NA
